item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 27min Official: Leny Yoro will be out of Man United game against Chelsea due to injur
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 27min Official: Leny Yoro will be out of Man United game against Chelsea due to injury.
Harry Maguire, Lisandro Martínez and Leny Yoro will be all OUT this weekend. 603 471 4 mil 132 mil

item.title: FPLStatus: FPL Status @FPLStatus · 3h Automatizado por @Albo3li Price Fallers! (11) #FPL Gabriel #ARS £7.1m Weiss #BUR £4.2m O.
